lesson.menu_title: Weather and Seasons -- How Is the Sky Today?
lesson.menu_desc: Talk about the weather and the seasons: weather, sunny, rain, cloudy, windy, hot, cold, season -- present continuous (It is raining now) -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- Weather and Seasons: How Is the Sky Today?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 9 -- Weather and Seasons

listenings.text: Hello, my name is Bianca. Let me tell you about my morning. I am at home, and I am looking out the window. The sky is grey and cloudy. It is raining now, and the wind is cold. I am drinking a hot coffee in the kitchen. My daughter is reading a book on the sofa. Today is not a sunny day, so I am wearing a warm jacket. I do not like the rain, but I love a calm morning at home.

Hi, I am Rodrigo. I want to tell you about the seasons in my city. We have four seasons. In summer it is very hot, and the sun is strong every day. In winter it is cold, and the wind is strong. In spring the weather is warm, and many flowers open. My favorite season is autumn, because it is not hot and not cold. Right now it is spring, and today it is sunny. I am happy, because I love a sunny day.

extra_audio.text: First, I look out the window in the morning. Second, the sky is grey and cloudy. Third, it is raining now. Fourth, I take my warm jacket. Fifth, I go to the bus in the rain.
